![][image1]  
***The “Wrap Note” Template***

**Purchase Price**

* Purchase Price Shall be $\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_.

**Down Payment & Earnest Money**

* Down payment shall be $\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ Inclusive of $\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ earnest money. 

**Promissory Note** 

* Buyer (Maker) Shall give Seller (Beneficiary) a Promissory Note in the amount of $\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_.  
  * *The note amount has to be greater than the underlying balance on the existing note.* 

**Interest Rate & Accrual** 

* Promissory Note shall bear interest at \_\_\_\_\_\_\_% simple interest per annum.   
* Interest shall begin accruing \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_.


  
**Payments**

* First payment shall be due \_\_\_\_\_\_ months from closing and each consecutive month thereafter.   
* Payments shall be interest only or more. (or “payments shall be $\_\_\_\_, or more” if your seller is insisting on a particular minimum amount per month.)  
  * *Payment amount must be equal to or greater than committed monthly payment on the underlying note.*    
* All outstanding principal balance due beneficiary on or before \_\_\_\_\_\_ years from closing.   
  * *This date should be at least 6 months prior to existing note’s maturity date.*   
* *First Right of Refusal Clause:* Maker of Note has First Right of Refusal to Purchase note should beneficiary elect to sell note prior to maturity.   
* Co beneficiaries on the note shall be \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_. (if applicable).   
* Remainder beneficiaries on the note shall be \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_. (if applicable). 




**Collateral**

* Promissory Note shall be initially collateralized by an all-inclusive trust deed on subject property, commonly known as \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_, Legally described as \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_.

**Escrow Collection**

* Buyer (Maker) and Seller (beneficiary) hereby agree to hire or employ an escrow collection account service to manage the ongoing commitments of this transaction. Escrow service will be instructed to collect payments from maker to beneficiary including 1/12 annual property tax and 1/12 annual insurance and is further instructed out of incoming proceeds to pay obligations of underlying mortgage on behalf of the seller and all taxes insurance when due for subject property. 

* The beneficiaries of both notes will be named as loss payees on the property insurance policy (paid by buyer). 


  **Attachments**


  Attached are blank Promissory Note Form Number: \_\_\_\_\_\_ and Blank all-inclusive trust deed Form Number: \_\_\_\_\_\_ which shall be prepared in escrow according to the terms and conditions set forth herein.
